import { ObservableInput, OperatorFunction, ObservedValueOf } from '../types'; export declare function concatMap<T, O extends ObservableInput<any>>(project: (value: T, index: number) => O): OperatorFunction<T, ObservedValueOf<O>>; /** @deprecated The `resultSelector` parameter will be removed in v8. Use an inner `map` instead. Details: https://rxjs.dev/deprecations/resultSelector */ export declare function concatMap<T, O extends ObservableInput<any>>(project: (value: T, index: number) => O, resultSelector: undefined): OperatorFunction<T, ObservedValueOf<O>>; /** @deprecated The `resultSelector` parameter will be removed in v8. Use an inner `map` instead. Details: https://rxjs.dev/deprecations/resultSelector */ export declare function concatMap<T, R, O extends ObservableInput<any>>(project: (value: T, index: number) => O, resultSelector: (outerValue: T, innerValue: ObservedValueOf<O>, outerIndex: number, innerIndex: number) => R): OperatorFunction<T, R>; //# sourceMappingURL=concatMap.d.ts.map
